{{Quote|Again an attack is neglected, and Wurth Skidder joins Daeshara'cor in death. And now a flurry of failures as a million blades swing at you, and there go Dorsk 82, and Seyyerin Itoklo, and Swilja Fenn, and who can count those we do not know of yet, or who will die tomorrow? When will you attack, Master Skywalker?|Kyp Durron criticizes Luke Skywalker following Itoklo's death|<ref name="eov1" />}}
'''Seyyerin Itoklo''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Etti]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]] who [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[New Jedi Order]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] was [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invaded]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]], who targeted Skywalker's Order as a threat to their plans of conquest. Itoklo had risen to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] by this [[Time/Legends|time]]. Early in the [[26 ABY/Legends|second year]] of the war, however, the Etti was turned over to the invaders and [[Death/Legends|killed]], following a Yuuzhan Vong ultimatum that stipulated the surrender of the Jedi Order in return for the cessation of the invasion.

==Biography==
Hailing from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]], Seyyerin Itoklo was a member of the [[Etti]] [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="ww" /> a pale-skinned [[Near-Human]] race known for their slender and delicate physiques.<ref name="Alien Encounters">''[[Alien Encounters]]''</ref> A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Itoklo joined [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[New Jedi Order]]<ref name="ww" /> and [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on the<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|124|Itoklo, Seyyerin}}</ref> [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]]<ref name="Yavin">{{DB|location|yavin4|Yavin 4}}</ref> of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].<ref name="CSWE" /> In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], however, [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] was [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invaded]] by an extra-galactic warfaring [[Species/Legends|species]] known as the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Blazing a path of conquest from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] toward the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]], elements of the Yuuzhan Vong leadership saw a threat in the New Jedi Order and its members,<ref name="bp">''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]''</ref> whom the invaders perceived as the galaxy's most powerful warriors.<ref name="tuf">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref> By the [[26 ABY/Legends|second year]] of the Yuuzhan Vong War,<ref name="eov1" /> Itoklo held the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="ww" />

After the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|conquest]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]], Yuuzhan Vong [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] called for the inhabitants of the galaxy to turn the members of the New Jedi Order over to him in return for the cessation of the Yuuzhan Vong advance.<ref name="bp" /> Following the ultimatum, several Jedi were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in quick succession, either by the Yuuzhan Vong, [[Peace Brigade]] collaborators, or the citizens in the galaxy who took the invaders at their word. Itoklo was one of the early victims of the purge;<ref name="eov1" /> the Etti Jedi Knight was killed whilst defending a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from the Yuuzhan Vong.<ref name="CSWE" /> [[Kyp Durron]], a Jedi Master who proposed that the Yuuzhan Vong should be fought with aggressive techniques, later lambasted Skywalker during a Jedi [[Conclave on Coruscant|conclave]] on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], blaming Skywalker's defensive approach to warfare as the reason why Itoklo and other Jedi had lost their lives.<ref name="eov1" />

==Personality and traits==
Seyyerin Itoklo trained as a Jedi—individuals who spent their lives in service to others and [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]—in Luke Skywalker's New Jedi Order.<ref name="eov1" /> Itoklo had dark [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and light skin.<ref name="ww" />

==Powers and abilities==
At the time of their death, Itoklo held the rank of Jedi Knight, having been deemed worthy of ascension to Knighthood by the Masters of Skywalker's Order.<ref name="ww" />

==Behind the scenes==
Seyyerin Itoklo was first mentioned in [[Greg Keyes]]' novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'', published in [[April]] [[2001]]. An illustration of the character was included in [[Daniel Wallace]]'s ''[[Who's Who in the New Jedi Order]]'', an article published in [[Star Wars Insider 57|''Star Wars Insider'' 57]], illustrated by [[Dan Veesenmeyer]] and [[Russell Walks]].
